meaning: n.才能,本领,能力,全体教员,(大学的)系,科,(授予的)权力
examples: The faculty agreed on a change in the requirements.
How can faculty improve their teaching so as to encourage creativity?
The Bush Foundation has funded a variety of faculty development programmes.
Previous Caltech faculty members include 33 Nobel laureates and visiting professors Albert Einstein and Stephen Hawking.
He is omnipresent on campus, attending everything from faculty awards events to dormitory pizza parties.
